data: FRED FEDFUNDS/CPI/UNRATE, 1985-2026 monthly; target = next-3-month policy move

verdict.environment_coupling: EARNS its place — macro pressure lifts direction over always-hold (0.6414->0.7071)
verdict.middle_member_scale: does NOT earn its place — routing through discrete/saturating members degrades the graded macro signal back toward always-hold (0.7071->0.6414)
